Definition: Count of bugs created today.
Calculation: COUNT(issues) where issuetype in (Bug,Defect) and created = today.

Definition: Count of bugs transitioned to Closed today.
Calculation: COUNT(distinct issue_key) where to_status='Closed' on event_date=today.

Definition: Current active bug count.
Calculation: COUNT(issues) where issuetype in (Bug,Defect) and statusCategory != Done.
Readiness: Ready once Jira ingest includes statusCategory

Definition: Bugs currently waiting for QA verification.
Calculation: COUNT(issues) where status='Resolved' and statusCategory != Done.

Definition: Distribution of new bugs by severity based on selected date range.
Calculation: COUNT(created) within selected range GROUP BY severity.

Definition: Alternative long-range severity distribution for validation.
Calculation: COUNT(created) within selected range GROUP BY severity.

Definition: Distribution of fixed bugs by priority.
Calculation: COUNT(to_status='Closed') within selected range GROUP BY priority.

Definition: Daily bug intake trend pivoted by priority for selected range.
Current active bugs grouped by POD/Team.
Current active bugs grouped by current status.
Daily active bug count trend.
Calculation: Daily snapshot of active count OR derived from changelog.
Readiness: Needs snapshot table or changelog-derived daily calc

Definition: Bugs transitioned to Reopened per day for selected range.
Readiness: Needs changelog ingest; ensure recent-first processing

Definition: Reopened / Closed ratio over time for selected range.
Active bugs grouped by fixVersion/milestone.
Daily executed cases across completed runs for selected range.
Overall pass rate for executed results in selected range.

Metric_Name: BVT pass rate (latest Basic BVT run)
Definition: Pass rate on most recent Basic BVT suite run.
Calculation: Filter suite_name='Basic BVT' and take latest run.
Readiness: Needs suite_name mapping or naming convention

Definition: Current active production errors.
Active errors with high severity (critical/error).
Distribution of active errors by severity.
Nuevos errores detectados en el rango seleccionado (deduplicados por error_id usando first_seen mínimo en ingests recientes).
Calculation: COUNT(error_id deduplicado) where DATE(first_seen UTC) in selected range sobre una ventana de ingest reciente.

Metric_Name: Median FPS over time by platform
Definition: Median FPS trend by platform for selected range.

Metric_Name: FPS stability % over time by platform
Definition: FPS stability % trend by platform for selected range.
Latest build size per platform.
Calculation: Latest row from manual table by platform.
